text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with Narita
Brian...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no one's looking, right?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Groan. Sorry... It's just a bit... Just a teensy little bit!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What the heck is she doing?
We see Rice Shower again in a park a little later.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ugh, my stomach... I-I just need one more...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you were buying taiyaki earlier?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eeek! B-B-Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, please d-d-don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You saw me eat all ten of those taiyaki?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ten?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ten taiyaki... is a bit of an overkill, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oof! Sorry, I'm sorry! I was just really, really
hungry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... And Hishiama just warned me not to eat
too much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rice, you idiot! Why can't you control yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Stop apologizing. Though... hiding out and
stuffing your face is probably something you
should reconsider.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, you're right... I'm really a
good-for-nothing. I'm sorry, and I'm sorry to
Hishiama too—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No, you got it wrong. Amazon wasn't trying to tell you not to eat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
She was just... worried. About you. About your
health.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: M-my... health?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Eating junk food in secret and not getting proper
nutrition is the opposite of what she wanted for
you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If you feel like you're not getting enough to eat,
just tell Amazon. Knowing her, I'm sure she'll
listen to you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... u-uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Waaah! I'm... I'm... I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: H-hey, why are you crying?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah, damn it... Trainer, you figure this out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's a trainer's job to cheer us up, isn't it?
choice_data_list: Let's run off what you ate!
We'll go with you to apologize.
We'll go with you to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's a trainer's job to cheer us up, isn't it?
choice_data_list: Let's run off what you ate!
We'll go with you to apologize.
We'll go with you to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Run?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Good idea. That's what I'd do.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If I run... I can work off what I ate...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to run! And after that... I'll
apologize to Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you mean right now? If you run right after
eating all that—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: She's not even listening.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. So this must be how Amazon always feels.

Narita Brian mutters at Rice Shower's back as she
runs off at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We'll do what?! Why the heck should I have to sit
through a lecture too?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... A l-lecture...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, don't you start getting freaked out now.
Like I said, she's just worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Brian...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: How do you know so much about Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: None of your business.

In the end, Narita Brian ends up going along with
Rice Shower to see Hishi Amazon.
